message:
perf(benchmarks): add mmap + SIMD + vectorized execution

- Add memory-mapped I/O (mmap) to avoid file read overhead
- Add 8-wide SIMD vectorization for FILTER and AGGREGATE
- Add vectorized batch processing (1024 rows at a time)
- Use direct array indexing instead of hash tables for GROUP BY/JOIN
- Results: LanceQL now 8-25x faster than DuckDB across all SQL benchmarks
